name: Nikolas Maerker
tagline: I create websites, photo, and video content for service businesses, companies, and brands that want a stronger presence and more qualified inbound leads.

hero.headline: Websites and content for service businesses, companies, and brands
hero.specialization: For service businesses, companies, and personal brands that want to communicate more clearly, look more credible, and build stronger trust online.
hero.roleBadge: Strategy, design, and execution handled by one person.

servicesHeading: Services built to turn attention into inquiries.
servicesLead: I combine strategy, design, and execution so your presence does more than look polished. It should communicate clearly, build trust, and generate the right kind of inquiries.

services.title: Web Design & Development
services.description: Websites and landing pages for brands, service businesses, and organizations that need to look credible and generate more inquiries.
bullets: SEO, performance, and solid technical execution
Landing pages, relaunches, and tailored web experiences

services.title: Photo & Video
services.description: Photo and video production for events, companies, and personal brands that want a more premium and recognizable visual presence.
bullets: Reels, aftermovies, and edited short-form video
Consistent visual direction from capture to delivery

services.title: Drone Pilot / Aerial
services.description: Aerial footage for real estate, events, and brand communication when perspective and production value make the difference.
bullets: Licensed aerial footage with thoughtful planning
Real estate, venues, events, and campaigns
Smooth cinematic shots for web and social

work.title: Wiro
work.description: A refreshed website for an alumni network with clearer structure, stronger trust signals, and a more direct path to contact.
resultsBullets: The positioning is easier to understand at a glance
Key content is easier to scan and digest
Contact touchpoints guide visitors more directly toward an inquiry

work.title: Tum
work.description: Website build for an alumni-focused organization with an emphasis on clarity, credibility, and a structure that stays easy to maintain over time.
resultsBullets: The overall presence feels more current and trustworthy
Members and prospective members can find information faster
The technical setup leaves room for future improvements

work.title: Cantero
work.description: Design and implementation for a consulting brand presence with a more premium feel, clearer service structure, and stronger trust cues.
resultsBullets: The brand presentation feels more focused and premium
Services and value are easier to understand quickly
The visual direction is more consistent across the entire presence

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: I listen to your vision and define the roadmap for success.

steps.title: Strategy
steps.description: Researching the market to position you perfectly.

steps.title: Creation
steps.description: Designing, building, and refining your digital assets.

steps.title: Launch
steps.description: Deploying to the world with full support and optimization.

media.heading: Content that shows the work.
media.youtubeEmptyText: Add media.youtubeId or media.youtubeEmbedUrl in site.en.json.
media.youtubePrivacyNote: The video is only loaded from YouTube after you click. Privacy-friendly by default.
media.instagramDescription: Recent projects, behind-the-scenes moments, and visual snapshots across web, photo, video, and drone work.

about.heading: Who I am.
about.paragraph: I'm a focused creator: fast, conversion-oriented. I build websites and content that perform.
bullets: High-performance sites and landing pages (Astro, Cloudflare)
Event photography, drone shots, and video editing
Clear process and communication from brief to delivery

contact.headline: Let's build something memorable.
contact.subline: Email is the fastest way to reach me. If you want, you can also use the form below to share your project scope, goal, and timeline right away.
contact.formIntro: Or use the form if you want to send a few helpful project details right away.

form.privacyNote: By submitting, you agree that your details are used to respond to your request.
